linkedin.text:
The best incentive trips don't impress your top performers. They silence them.

That's Saint-Tropez. It never shouts — and that's exactly why it works.

A yacht-deck reception at golden hour. A private beach club that feels like it was reserved for your team alone. A hillside villa where the sea view makes the whole room go quiet. For a tight group of high achievers or a VIP board retreat, few rewards land harder.

At Uproduction we've spent 15+ years securing the access most agencies only ask about, then choreographing every moment around it — from business to pleasure. The result is a program your people say yes to before you finish the sentence.

Planning the Côte d'Azur for 2026? Let's design something for your top tier. DM me or book a call.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #MICE
linkedin.cta: DM us or book a call

facebook.text:
Some places impress your team. Saint-Tropez makes them go quiet. ⛵

Yacht-deck receptions, private beach clubs, hillside villas with sea views that stop a conversation mid-sentence — it's the kind of reward your top performers never forget. We handle the access and choreograph every moment, from business to pleasure.

If you were sending your best people anywhere on the Côte d'Azur in 2026, where would it be? 👇

Thinking about it for real? Send us a message and let's design it.

image_prompt: Aerial drone view over the Saint-Tropez peninsula at midday, turquoise bays dotted with white yachts, pine-covered headlands meeting golden beaches, a sweep of Côte d'Azur coastline under brilliant blue sky, no people visible, luxurious and expansive. Photorealistic, 35mm film grain, no CGI, no text, no logos.
